title: Talking to strangers at the gym
author: thitran
aiHeadline: Meet the guy who decided that small talk with strangers at the gym was the best way to waste his time, because who doesn't love awkward conversations about their deadlifts?

title: GameStop makes $55.5B takeover offer for eBay
author: n1b0m
aiHeadline: GameStop, the company that somehow survived despite being everyone's favorite punchline, has decided to double down on its retail genius by offering to buy eBay for $55.5 billion. Because what the world needs right now is more failed retail giants buying other failed retail giants.

title: Trademark violation: Fake Notepad++ for Mac
author: maxloh
aiHeadline: Trademark violation alert! Someone had the brilliant idea to create a fake Notepad++ for Mac, because clearly the world needs more illegal and completely unnecessary software.

title: Removable batteries in smartphones will be mandatory in the EU starting in 2027
author: rdeboo
aiHeadline: Starting in 2027, EU smartphones will have removable batteries, because nothing says 'modern technology' like being able to take your phone apart like an old flip phone. Progress!

title: Microsoft Edge stores all passwords in memory in clear text, even when unused
author: cft
aiHeadline: Microsoft Edge is now storing all your passwords in clear text in memory, even when you're not using them. Because nothing says 'secure' like leaving your login credentials out in the open for hackers to find. Genius move, Microsoft!
